meta.title: LionGate Sarl | IT & Cosmetics Distribution in Cameroon
meta.description: LionGate Sarl, based in Douala, Cameroon. Dual expertise: IT & Software Outsourcing and Cosmetics Product Distribution. German partnership.

hero.headline: Your technology and business partner in Central Africa
hero.subheadline: IT & Software Outsourcing and premium cosmetics distribution, from Douala, backed by a German partnership.
hero.imageAlt: Container terminal at the port of Douala at dusk

poles.label: Our Areas of Expertise
poles.itDescription: DevOps, Odoo ERP, Artificial Intelligence, full-stack development (Symfony, Nuxt, FastAPI). We design and deploy custom software solutions.
poles.cosmeticsDescription: Distribution of premium cosmetic products in partnership with German manufacturers. European quality for the African market.
poles.itImageAlt: Software engineers collaborating around a laptop
poles.cosmeticsImageAlt: Premium skincare bottles arranged in warm natural light

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Business?
cta.subtitle: Let's discuss your project. Our teams in Douala are ready to help.

meta.title: About | LionGate Sarl
meta.description: Discover the history, mission, and values of LionGate Sarl, based in Douala, Cameroon. Dual IT and Cosmetics Distribution expertise.

intro.label: Our Story
intro.headline: Technological excellence serving Africa
intro.content: Founded in Douala, LionGate Sarl has established itself as a key player in Cameroon's technology landscape. Our dual expertise, IT & Software Outsourcing on one hand and Cosmetics Distribution on the other, reflects our commitment to building bridges between Africa and Europe, particularly through our German partnership.
intro.imageAlt: City skyline at dusk seen from above

items.title: Excellence
items.description: We strive for excellence in every project, every line of code, every client relationship.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We adopt the latest technologies to deliver cutting-edge solutions.

items.title: Partnership
items.description: We believe in lasting relationships with our clients, our German partners, and our teams.

items.title: Local Impact
items.description: We contribute to the economic development of Cameroon and Central Africa.

members.imageAlt: Portrait of the Chief Technology Officer

presence.label: Our Presence
presence.headline: Douala, at the Heart of Central Africa
presence.content: Based in Douala, the economic capital of Cameroon, we are at the center of the African market. Our partnership with German companies allows us to bring world-class solutions to our clients.

facts.title: Douala, Cameroon
facts.description: Headquarters and engineering teams in the heart of the economic capital.

facts.title: Germany
facts.description: Industrial and technology partners, including the PALIGO B2B/B2C platform.

presence.imageAlt: Container ship docked at a port terminal

meta.title: IT & Software Outsourcing | LionGate Sarl
meta.description: IT services and software development: DevOps, Odoo ERP, Artificial Intelligence, full-stack development. Agile methodology, GitHub Flow.

hero.label: IT & Software Outsourcing
hero.headline: Software solutions that transform your business
hero.subheadline: DevOps, Odoo ERP, artificial intelligence and full-stack development for demanding teams.
hero.imageAlt: Lines of code on a developer's screen

devops.title: DevOps
devops.description: Infrastructure as Code, CI/CD, containerization, monitoring. We industrialize your deployments for greater reliability and velocity.
devops.imageAlt: Rows of servers in a data center

odoo.title: Odoo ERP
odoo.description: Implementation, customization, and development of Odoo modules. From requirements analysis to production deployment.
odoo.imageAlt: Business analytics dashboard on a laptop screen

ai.title: AI & Products
ai.description: Development of AI solutions adapted to the African context: lightweight models, multilingual interfaces.
ai.imageAlt: Engineer reviewing a machine learning model on screen

fullstack.title: Full-Stack
fullstack.description: Custom web development with modern technologies: Symfony, Nuxt.js, FastAPI, React. Clean code, robust architecture.
fullstack.imageAlt: Developer workspace with a code editor open

methodology.label: Methodology
methodology.headline: Agile, Transparent, Efficient
methodology.content: We apply agile methodologies and GitHub Flow to ensure transparency, quality, and responsiveness. Every project benefits from continuous monitoring, iterative deliveries, and smooth communication with our clients.

cta.title: Have a Project in Mind?
cta.subtitle: Let's discuss your needs. Free consultation with no obligation.

meta.title: Cosmetics Distribution | LionGate Sarl
meta.description: Distribution of premium cosmetic products in partnership with German manufacturers. European quality available in Cameroon and Central Africa.

hero.label: Cosmetics Distribution
hero.headline: European quality within reach
hero.subheadline: German partnership, B2B distribution and premium products for the Central African market.

activity.label: Our Activity
activity.headline: Import and distribution of premium cosmetics
activity.content: We select and distribute high-quality cosmetic products manufactured by our German partners. Our knowledge of the African market allows us to offer products tailored to local needs and preferences.
activity.imageAlt: Warehouse shelves stocked with packaged goods

partnership.label: Partnership
partnership.headline: German Excellence in Africa
partnership.content: Our partnership with German manufacturers allows us to offer products that meet the strictest quality standards. We handle the complete import chain, from product selection to market launch in Cameroon.

cta.title: Interested in Our Products?
cta.subtitle: Contact our sales team to discover our ranges and distribution terms.

meta.title: Careers | LionGate Sarl
meta.description: Join the LionGate Sarl team in Douala. Positions in IT, software development, cosmetics distribution. Spontaneous applications accepted.

intro.label: Careers
intro.headline: Build the Future With Us
intro.content: Joining LionGate Sarl means becoming part of a dynamic, innovation-driven company rooted in African realities. We offer a stimulating work environment where every talent can thrive.

culture.label: Culture
culture.headline: Our Work Environment
culture.content: We foster a team spirit based on trust, autonomy, and knowledge sharing. Our teams benefit from a modern work environment, powerful tools, and continuous training.
culture.imageAlt: Team members working together in a modern office

vacancies.headline: Current Opportunities
vacancies.noVacancies: No open positions at the moment. Feel free to submit a spontaneous application.

meta.title: Privacy Policy | LionGate Sarl
meta.description: Privacy policy of LionGate Sarl. Personal data protection, cookies, GDPR rights.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content: LionGate Sarl is committed to protecting the confidentiality of your personal data. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your information. We only collect data necessary for processing your requests and improving our services. In accordance with applicable regulations, you have the right to access, rectify, and delete your data. For any questions, contact us at contact@liongate-sarl.com.

meta.title: Terms of Use | LionGate Sarl
meta.description: Terms of use for the LionGate Sarl website.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.content: Use of this site implies acceptance of these terms and conditions. The content of this site (texts, images, logos) is the property of LionGate Sarl and may not be reproduced without permission. LionGate Sarl strives to keep the information on this site up to date but cannot guarantee its absolute accuracy. External links are provided for information purposes only and do not engage the responsibility of LionGate Sarl.
